content: agent1: implementing normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (refactor image_to_base64). Will touch that file only.

agent1: added normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) as a module-level function in types.py, and refactored image_to_base64 to call it. It also detects already-base64-encoded input (via b64decode validate=True) so it doesn't double-encode. If your get_image_mimetype() extracts mimetype-guessing separately, feel free to have it call decoded_for_guessing from normalize_image_bytes, or keep them independent - we appear to be in separate sandboxes so no file clobbering on my end.
